skipped.reason: False positive: PyJWT is pinned at 2.12.0 (>=2.4.0 enforced in pyproject.toml), and all jwt.decode() calls already pass algorithms explicitly. The vulnerability only affects versions < 2.4.0.

structured_output.reasoning: Investigated PyJWT usage across the codebase. The vulnerability (CVE-2022-29217) affects PyJWT < 2.4.0 when jwt.decode() is called without an explicit algorithms argument. This repository (1) pins PyJWT at 2.12.0 in requirements/base.txt, (2) enforces >=2.4.0 in pyproject.toml, and (3) passes algorithms explicitly on every jwt.decode() call (superset/utils/oauth2.py:265, superset/async_events/async_query_manager.py:215, superset/security/manager.py:4064). The jwt_verifier.py uses authlib.jose, not PyJWT. No code change needed — finding is fully mitigated by both version and coding practice.
